ksa_text: Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences, translating statistical risk measures into business impact terms.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Risk Management (affinity 0.65); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.5262). A Data Governance Analyst would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Governance Analyst whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.

decision_rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Risk Management (affinity 0.65); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.5262). A Data Governance Analyst would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.
